name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans at 4702 N McCarty St #5, Houston, TX 77013 in the El Dorado / Oates Prairie neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Call +1 281-317-6257.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is a car title lender operating out of a single storefront at 1473 S Trezevant St, Suite 23, in Memphis, Tennessee 38114. The company operates under the domain cartitleloansla.com, suggesting it is part of a broader multi-state title loan network. The Memphis branch is reachable by phone at 1-888-903-0217 or by email at service@swiftloans.com. In-person service runs Monday through Friday from 9am to 7pm and on Saturdays from 10am to 5pm; the office is closed on Sundays.

The company's core product is a car title loan — a secured loan in which a vehicle's title is pledged as collateral. Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000, structured in two tiers: a smaller emergency tier from $100 to $2,000 and a larger tier from $2,000 to $50,000. Swift Title Loans advertises same-day cash for applicants who complete the online process before noon. Borrowers retain use of their vehicle throughout the repayment period, and the title is returned once the loan is fully repaid. The online application is protected by 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption.

The lender explicitly markets to credit-challenged consumers, stating on its homepage that bad credit and past bankruptcies are welcome — a meaningful differentiator from conventional lenders. Customer reviews consistently mention a staff member named Alfred for his patience, plain-language explanations of loan terms, and willingness to address detailed questions. Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm) add scheduling flexibility compared to standard banking hours. The same-day funding option for pre-noon applications directly addresses the urgency that typically drives borrowers to title lenders in the first place.

For Memphis residents with limited credit access who own a vehicle, Swift Title Loans can function as an emergency funding option of last resort. The critical caveat is that the website discloses no APR, interest rates, fees, or repayment terms — information essential for evaluating total borrowing cost. Title loans as a product category typically carry very high interest rates, often well above 100% APR, and the absence of any rate disclosure is a significant transparency gap. Additionally, multiple customer reviews share an unusually similar structure, tone, and vocabulary, which raises questions about their organic nature. Prospective borrowers should insist on a full written cost disclosure before signing anything.
pros: Explicitly accepts applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies per homepage
Same-day cash disbursement available when application is submitted before noon
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Loan range spans $100 to $50,000, covering both small emergencies and larger needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday service (10am–5pm)
Online application with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for data security
Consistent customer praise for staff member Alfred's patience and clear explanations of terms
cons: Website discloses no APR, interest rates, fees, or repayment term information
Multiple customer reviews share suspiciously similar structure, tone, and phrasing
No mobile app or online portal for managing or paying existing loans
Closed Sundays; no evening hours past 7pm
Single Memphis location only; parking cited as frequently crowded by reviewers
best_for: Memphis-area car owners with bad credit or past bankruptcies needing emergency cash
Borrowers who need same-day funding and can complete an application before noon
Individuals rejected by conventional lenders due to poor credit history
Short-term borrowing needs where a vehicle title can serve as collateral
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis car owners with bad credit or bankruptcy history who need emergency cash fast and have exhausted conventional lending options. The primary caveat is that the website discloses no interest rates, APR, or fees — title loans typically carry very high costs, and borrowers must request full written disclosures before committing.
services: Car title loans (vehicle title used as collateral)
Same-day cash disbursement for applications submitted before noon
Loans for applicants with past bankruptcies
Loan term consultation with in-branch staff
Vehicle title return upon full loan repayment
